highlights.title: ByteDance-Backed Dongchedi Is Said to Consider Hong Kong IPO
highlights.description: Beijing Dongchedi Technology Co., an automotive information and trading platform known as DCar, is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong as soon as this year, according to people familiar with the situation.

highlights.title: Anthropic to Pentagon: Autonomous weapons could hurt US troops and civilians
Engie Tries to Catch Peers With $14 Billion UK Power Grid Bet
highlights.description: After four years of taking a cautious approach to deals, Engie SA Chief Executive Officer Catherine MacGregor made her biggest acquisition yet with a £10.5 billion ($14.2 billion) bet on UK electricity grids.

highlights.title: CoreWeave shares slip 8% as quarterly revenue guidance disappoints
highlights.description: The company's quarterly revenue forecast fell short of consensus.

highlights.title: Google Wins Conditional Nod From Seoul to Offer Precision Maps
highlights.description: Google won conditional approval from South Korea to offer high-precision maps in the country after a nearly two-decade battle, securing a major concession in a sign that Seoul is ready to temper national security concerns with growing tech ambitions.

highlights.title: Xi’s AI Ambitions Collide With China’s Fragile Employment Market
highlights.description: Days after back-flipping AI humanoids dazzled China with a new year performance alongside dancers, a small research firm jolted US markets with a stark warning about how automation could trigger an economic spiral by displacing workers.

highlights.title: Netflix Investors Cheer Decision to Drop Fight for Warner Bros.
highlights.description: Netflix Inc. just won by losing.

highlights.title: Samsung Uncommited to Another iPhone Air Rival or Trifold, COO Says
highlights.description: Samsung Electronics Co. is still evaluating whether it will release another super-thin smartphone after sales of its inaugural attempt, last year’s Galaxy S25 Edge, were comparatively “lower” than the company’s other handsets.

highlights.title: Fujitsu taps Broadcom's 3D chip tech for 144-core Monaka CPU
The Latest Repair Battlefield Is the Iowa Farmlands—Again
highlights.description: A new bill that would give farmers in Iowa the right to repair is a big threat to tractor manufacturer John Deere.

ai.title: The Latest Repair Battlefield Is the Iowa Farmlands—Again
ai.description: A new bill that would give farmers in Iowa the right to repair is a big threat to tractor manufacturer John Deere.

ai.title: AI Gains Can Be Unlocked Without Cutting Jobs, Morningstar Says
ai.description: Companies are increasingly using artificial intelligence as justification for cutting headcount and trimming costs, rather than using the technology to boost productivity by redeploying workers, according to Morningstar Inc.

ai.title: Mainland Traders Sell Hong Kong Stocks on Earnings Frustration
ai.description: Mainland Chinese investors are accelerating their exit from Hong Kong-listed shares, signaling impatience with big technology firms’ inability to translate artificial intelligence spending into earnings growth.

ai.title: Rivian has a new performance division but for crazy off-road adventures
ai.description:
Rivian just announced a new division within the company focused on feats of performance, but with a uniquely Rivian twist, aiming for extreme off-road stunts instead of your standard circuit racing.
more…

ai.title: Jack Dorsey’s fintech outfit Block announces 40% layoffs, blames AI, gets 23% stock bump
AI Capex Fueling Strongest EM Earnings in Two Decades, MS Says
ai.description: Emerging-market stocks are heading for their strongest stretch of earnings growth since the 2002-04 super-cycle, powered by a surge in artificial-intelligence investment that is reshaping the asset class, according to Morgan Stanley.

ai.title: Japanese Chipmaker Rapidus Gets $1.6 Billion in Government Funds
ai.description: The Japanese government will invest a total of ¥250 billion ($1.6 billion) in state-backed Rapidus Corp. as part of Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s pledge to boost domestic chipmaking.

ev_autonomous.title: BYD to unveil 1,500kW EV charger that can add 2km of range in 1 second
ev_autonomous.description:
BYD will hold a press conference on March 5 unveiling several new versions of its technologies, including new batteries, ADAS software, and a 1,500kW charger that has already been spotted in the wild.
more…

ev_autonomous.title: Donut solid-state batteries tested, Tesla engineer quits, and solar value
ev_autonomous.description:
On today’s extraordinary episode of Quick Charge, we reflect on the fact that extraordinary claims require extraordinary evidence, and both Donut Labs AND Tesla are a long long way from turning everyone into believers.
